match.userMessage:
Bright natural coastal light editorial photograph of SCARLETT in light casual beachwear suitable for sun and sand standing barefoot on wet sand at the shoreline as a wave gently rushes up and breaks at her ankles with foam swirling around her feet, a lipstick tube resting beside an embossed mark in the sand, she turns toward the endless horizon with coral lips catching the golden light, the open turquoise ocean stretching bright and vast under a clear morning sky, golden sunlight reflecting off wet sand and water, shallow depth of field emphasizing foreground textures and the distant horizon, dynamic handheld camera angle at eye level with natural micro-movement, clean crisp color grading and true-to-life coastal palette.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - CONTINUOUS - Sandy shoreline where waves break at ankles
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
